title: Set 6: The Deep Sea Adventure 🌊
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: divers went on a journey to the bottom of the Atlantic
. They wanted to explore a part of the

that no sunlight can reach it. They traveled inside a special metal ship that could protect them from the cold water.

As they moved
the dark water, they turned on a powerful creature. Suddenly, a strange

swam past their window. It had glowing skin and very large eyes. One of the divers said, "The environment down here is very different from the world we know. We must be very careful because we only have enough oxygen for four hours."

They took many videos of the plants and animals before returning to the surface. Their discovery will help us understand more about how life survives in the darkest places on our planet.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: How to catch a big fish

explanations_vi: Một đội gồm các thợ lặn chuyên nghiệp (professional).
Họ muốn khám phá một phần của đại dương (ocean).
Nơi sâu (deep) đến mức ánh sáng không thể chiếu tới.
Khi họ di chuyển xuyên qua (through) làn nước tối.
Họ bật một ngọn đèn (light) có công suất lớn.
Tiêu đề B (Những bí mật của vùng nước tối) là đúng nhất vì kể về chuyến thám hiểm đáy đại dương.
